36	    table for the given database connection. These results are cached.
37	    """

41	        # The SpatialRefSys model for the spatial backend.

45	
46	    alias, get_srs = (

48	            connection.alias,
49	            lambda srid: SpatialRefSys.objects.using(connection.alias)
50	            .get(srid=srid)
51	            .srs,
52	        )
53	        if SpatialRefSys
54	        else (None, SpatialReference)
55	    )
56	    if srid not in _srid_cache[alias]:
57	        srs = get_srs(srid)
58	        units, units_name = srs.units
59	        _srid_cache[alias][srid] = SRIDCacheEntry(
60	            units=units,
61	            units_name=units_name,
62	            spheroid='SPHEROID["%s",%s,%s]'
63	            % (srs["spheroid"], srs.semi_major, srs.inverse_flattening),
64	            geodetic=srs.geographic,
65	        )
66	
67	    return _srid_cache[alias][srid]
